texto: When I decide who to vote for as president, I ask myself who will be best for America and for the world. texto: Ed Koch will never 'rest in peace.' That was not his way. He was always nervously squirming, while making others squirm as well. Comfort was not his goal. texto: On television and in the movies, crimes are always solved. Nothing is left uncertain. By the end, the viewer knows whodunit.
